elements.original_description: A cheerful cartoon character holding shopping bags filled with colorful items, smiling broadly. The bags have bright patterns and the character exudes happiness. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: A cheerful cartoon character holding shopping bags filled with colorful items, smiling broadly. The bags have bright patterns and the character exudes happiness. Professional 2D cartoon illustration, bright and vibrant color palette, clean lines, flat shading, pure white background. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks. The mood is cheerful and bright, reflecting happiness from shopping. High resolution, sharp focus.
